news.title:

Price trades above 200 EMA, forming higher highs in trend.
news.summary:

news.title:
Honasa Consumer's Q4 business update projects growth in the late twenties.
Reported by CNBC TV18, Honasa Consumer anticipates strong performance this quarter.
news.summary:

news.title: Honasa shares jumped 10% following its Q4 business update.

news.title:
Honasa Consumer projects late 20s% growth in Q4 FY26, driven by offline channels.
Mamaearth to grow in teens, younger brands in mid-20s%; margins aided by marketing leverage.
news.summary:
Honasa Consumer projects late 20s% growth in Q4 FY26, driven by offline channels.

news.title:
Sumeet Bagadia recommends five breakout stocks: National Aluminium, NLC India, Honasa Consumer, Ather Energy, and Aurobindo Pharma.
Nifty 50 fell 2.1% to 22,819.6; Sensex dropped 2.3% to 73,583.2 amid weak sentiment and geopolitical tensions.
news.summary:
Sumeet Bagadia recommends five breakout stocks: National Aluminium, NLC India, Honasa Consumer, Ather Energy, and Aurobindo Pharma.
Nifty 50 fell 2.1% to 22,819.6; Sensex dropped 2.3% to 73,583.2 amid weak sentiment and geopolitical tensions.

news.title:
Honasa Consumer Ltd will join 'Chasing Growth 2026' hosted by Kotak Securities on Feb 25.
The physical investor meeting will occur at Grand Hyatt, Mumbai, from 10 AM-6 PM.
news.summary:
Honasa Consumer Ltd will join 'Chasing Growth 2026' hosted by Kotak Securities on Feb 25.
The physical investor meeting will occur at Grand Hyatt, Mumbai, from 10 AM-6 PM.

news.title:
Honasa Consumer Ltd reported 21.7% revenue growth with record quarterly revenue.
Core brand Mamaearth saw double-digit growth; acquired Reginald Men to boost male skincare segment.
news.summary:
Honasa Consumer Ltd reported 21.7% revenue growth with record quarterly revenue.
Core brand Mamaearth saw double-digit growth; acquired Reginald Men to boost male skincare segment.

news.title:
Honasa Consumer's compensation reduced by Dubai court from AED 25M to AED 1.7M.
Company plans appeal to Cassation Court; Delhi HC grants anti-enforcement injunction.
news.summary:
Honasa Consumer's compensation reduced by Dubai court from AED 25M to AED 1.7M.
Company plans appeal to Cassation Court; Delhi HC grants anti-enforcement injunction.

news.title: Goldman Sachs keeps neutral rating for Honasa Consumer, raises target price to 330.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs keeps neutral rating for Honasa Consumer, raises target price to 330.

news.title:
Honasa Consumer Ltd shared the audio recording of its Q3 earnings call on its website.
The call discussed unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and 9 months ending Dec 31, 2025.
news.summary:
Honasa Consumer Ltd shared the audio recording of its Q3 earnings call on its website.
The call discussed unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and 9 months ending Dec 31, 2025.

news.title:
Honasa Consumer's Q3 EBITDA rose to 654M INR from 261M INR YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin improved to 10.9% from 5.0%, reflecting efficiency gains.
news.summary:
Honasa Consumer's Q3 EBITDA rose to 654M INR from 261M INR YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin improved to 10.9% from 5.0%, reflecting efficiency gains.

news.title:
Arohi Asset Management acquired 760,000 shares of Honasa Consumer Ltd, raising its stake to 5.1%.
The acquisition was made on Jan 19, 2026, via open market, involving managed funds and SMAs.
news.summary:
Arohi Asset Management acquired 760,000 shares of Honasa Consumer Ltd, raising its stake to 5.1%.
The acquisition was made on Jan 19, 2026, via open market, involving managed funds and SMAs.

news.title:
Honasa Consumer Ltd's board meeting on Feb 12, 2026, will review unaudited Q3 & 9M FY25 financial results.
Trading window remains closed for designated persons until 48 hours post-results announcement.
news.summary:
Honasa Consumer Ltd's board meeting on Feb 12, 2026, will review unaudited Q3 & 9M FY25 financial results.
Trading window remains closed for designated persons until 48 hours post-results announcement.

news.title:
Honasa Consumer Limited breaks out of ascending channel with higher highs, lows.
The breakout is supported by increased volume, surpassing horizontal resistance.
news.summary:
Honasa Consumer Limited breaks out of ascending channel with higher highs, lows.

news.title:
Honasa Consumer Ltd completed acquisition of 95% stake in BTM Ventures for INR 197.96 Cr.
BTM Ventures, operating Reginald Men brand, now a subsidiary of Honasa Consumer Ltd.
news.summary:
Honasa Consumer Ltd completed acquisition of 95% stake in BTM Ventures for INR 197.96 Cr.
BTM Ventures, operating Reginald Men brand, now a subsidiary of Honasa Consumer Ltd.

news.title:
Emkay predicts subdued Q3FY26 performance for FMCG firms but expects recovery due to tailwinds.
Recovery in growth is crucial for valuations, per Emkay Global Financial Services.
news.summary:
Emkay predicts subdued Q3FY26 performance for FMCG firms but expects recovery due to tailwinds.
Recovery in growth is crucial for valuations, per Emkay Global Financial Services.

news.title:
Honasa Consumer, Mamaearth's parent, acquired Reginald Men for ₹195 crore, entering men's grooming with its sunscreen focus.
GCPL acquired Muuchstac for ₹450 crore, targeting men's face wash market, growing 25% annually, with strong online sales.
news.summary:
Honasa Consumer, Mamaearth's parent, acquired Reginald Men for ₹195 crore, entering men's grooming with its sunscreen focus.
GCPL acquired Muuchstac for ₹450 crore, targeting men's face wash market, growing 25% annually, with strong online sales.

news.title:
Honasa Consumer Ltd acquired 25% stake in Couch Commerce Pvt Ltd.
The acquisition involved INR 10 crore for Compulsory Convertible Preference Shares.
news.summary:
Honasa Consumer Ltd acquired 25% stake in Couch Commerce Pvt Ltd.
The acquisition involved INR 10 crore for Compulsory Convertible Preference Shares.

news.title: HSBC downgrades Honasa Consumer Limited, sets a target price of Rs 242.
